_comment: Example .pi/mcp.json for the Pi coding agent (pi.dev), used by the pi-mcp-extension package and compatible community MCP clients (scaryrawr/pi-mcp, nicobailon/pi-mcp-adapter). Drop this in as `.pi/mcp.json` in your project (project-level scope) or `~/.pi/agent/mcp.json` (global scope). The five servers below each scope Pi to a different MCP Toolbox toolset by hitting /mcp/<toolset> — Toolbox routes those paths to the matching toolset; /mcp alone (no suffix) exposes the full default toolset (every registered tool). toolbox-ontology is the business-meaning layer: resolve the user's terms there first (glossary_lookup / ontology_search), then route to a data tool via ontology_bindings. Pick whichever subset matches the role you want Pi to play; delete entries you do not want. The dev-only execute-sql tool (analytics_dev toolset) is intentionally NOT registered here.
